mapper.sql: id, project_id, name, url, url_hash, crawl_frequency, status, description, last_crawled_at, last_error, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
id, project_id, source_id, title, url, url_hash, summary, content, publish_date, category, policy_no, index_status, error_message, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at

task_id, project_id, source_id, source_name, status, progress, fetched_count, indexed_count, failed_count, message, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into policy_source (project_id, name, url, url_hash, crawl_frequency, status, description, created_by, updated_by) values (#{projectId}, #{name}, #{url}, #{urlHash}, #{crawlFrequency}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.select: select from policy_source where id = #{sourceId} and deleted = 0
select from policy_source where project_id = #{projectId} and url_hash = #{urlHash} and deleted = 0 limit 1
select from policy_source where project_id = #{projectId} and status = 'ENABLED' and deleted = 0 order by id asc

select from policy_source where status = 'ENABLED' and deleted = 0 and crawl_frequency in ('DAILY', 'WEEKLY') and ( (crawl_frequency = 'DAILY' and (last_crawled_at is null or last_crawled_at < timestampadd(day, -1, current_timestamp))) or (crawl_frequency = 'WEEKLY' and (last_crawled_at is null or last_crawled_at < timestampadd(day, -7, current_timestamp))) ) order by last_crawled_at asc, id asc

select count(1) from policy_crawl_task pct join generate_task gt on gt.id = pct.task_id and gt.deleted = 0 where pct.source_id = #{sourceId} and pct.deleted = 0 and gt.status in ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING', 'RETRYING')

select count(1) from policy_crawl_task pct join generate_task gt on gt.id = pct.task_id and gt.deleted = 0 where pct.project_id = #{projectId} and pct.source_id is null and pct.deleted = 0 and gt.status in ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING', 'RETRYING')
mapper.update: update policy_source set name = #{name}, url = #{url}, url_hash = #{urlHash}, crawl_frequency = #{crawlFrequency}, description = #{description}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update policy_source set deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{sourceId} and deleted = 0
update policy_source set last_crawled_at = current_timestamp, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{sourceId} and deleted = 0
update policy_source set last_error = #{lastError}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{sourceId} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into policy_crawl_task (task_id, project_id, source_id, source_name, status, progress, fetched_count, indexed_count, failed_count, message, created_by, updated_by) values (#{taskId}, #{projectId}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceName}, #{status}, coalesce(#{progress}, 0), coalesce(#{fetchedCount}, 0), coalesce(#{indexedCount}, 0), coalesce(#{failedCount}, 0), #{message}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.select: select from policy_crawl_task where task_id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update policy_crawl_task set status = 'RUNNING', progress = 10, started_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where task_id = #{taskId} and status in ('QUEUED', 'FAILED') and deleted = 0
update policy_crawl_task set status = 'FAILED', progress = 100, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where task_id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0

update policy_crawl_task set status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, fetched_count = #{fetchedCount}, indexed_count = #{indexedCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, message = #{message}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = case when #{status} in ('SUCCESS','FAILED','CANCELED') then current_timestamp else finished_at end, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where task_id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into policy_article (project_id, source_id, title, url, url_hash, summary, content, publish_date, category, policy_no, index_status, error_message, created_by, updated_by) values (#{projectId}, #{sourceId}, #{title}, #{url}, #{urlHash}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{publishDate}, #{category}, #{policyNo}, #{indexStatus}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: update policy_article set source_id = #{sourceId}, title = #{title}, url = #{url}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, category = #{category}, policy_no = #{policyNo}, index_status = #{indexStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select from policy_article where project_id = #{projectId} and url_hash = #{urlHash} and deleted = 0 limit 1
select from policy_article where id = #{articleId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update policy_article set index_status = 'INDEXING', error_message = null, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{articleId} and deleted = 0
update policy_article set index_status = 'SUCCESS', error_message = null, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{articleId} and deleted = 0
update policy_article set index_status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{articleId} and deleted = 0
